subject: Joint Distributions
question: The joint probability density function of the random variables $X$ and $Y$ is given by $f_{XY}(x,y) = \begin{cases} \frac{1}{3}x - y + 1 & 1 \le x \le 2,\ 0 \le y \le 1 \\ 0 & \text{otherwise.} \end{cases}$ (a) Find the conditional probability density function of $X$ given $Y = y$. (b) Find $\Pr(X < \frac{3}{2} | Y = \frac{1}{2})$.
